text:
| # | Primitive | Source | Why |
|---|---|---|---|
| 16 | Importance scoring per memory (0-1 float) | ProtoGensis | Priority retrieval — old but important > recent noise |
| 17 | Chrome 146 Gemini Nano integration | Chrome Early Access | Browser-native AI, zero API cost |
| 18 | Dynamic permission rules (CC-as-OS) | Obs #22526 | Replace static PermissionDialog with runtime policy engine |

**Reason:** Adding 'Dynamic permission rules' addresses the critical blocker of static rules vs. 78 dynamic system rules. It enables the 'CC-as-OS' capability needed for secure, context-aware execution without manual rule updates.
reason: This fills the pending gap for dynamic permission management, directly solving the 'static vs. dynamic rules' bottleneck identified in the assimilation priority list.
